channel.title: Motivation on Quach
channel.description: Recent content in Motivation on Quach

item.title: My Motivation Collection
item.description:
Movies

  • The Pursuit of Happyness - USA - 2006
  • The Shawshank Redemption - USA - 1994
  • Forrest Gump - USA - 1994
  • 3 Idiots - India - 2009
  • Cast Away - USA - 2000
  • Itaewon Class - South Korea - 2020
  • Prison Playbook - South Korea - 2017
  • Inside Out - USA - 2015
  • Thời đại mới - China - 2010
  • Upstream - China - 2024
  • Slumdog Millionaire - India - 2008
  • Like Stars on Earth - India - 2007

Songs

YouTube Playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLWRGo-tQGE8StsIPLEbSKxjMbLCdWcjKM
